title: Blockchain Transaction Flow
description: A visual representation of the sequential steps involved in processing a transaction on a blockchain network, from initiation to confirmation and ledger updating.
relationships: Transaction is broadcast to the P2P network
Miners/Validators collect transactions into a candidate block
Network nodes validate the block through consensus (e.g., Proof-of-Work)
Validated block is added to the chain
All nodes update their copy of the distributed ledger
